testcase.name: it can register a new user and create a tenant
testcase.file: tests/Feature/AuthTest.php::it can register a new user and create a tenant
testcase.failure: it can register a new user and create a tenantExpected response status code [201] but received 500. Failed asserting that 500 is identical to 201. at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/TestResponseAssert.php:45 at vendor/laravel/framework/src/Illuminate/Testing/TestResponse.php:175 at tests/Feature/AuthTest.php:17
